info.title: The HCB API
info.description:
The HCB API is an unauthenticated REST API that allows you to read public information from organizations with Transparency Mode enabled.

Questions or suggestions?
Reach us in the #hcb channel on the Hack Club Slack or email hcb@hackclub.com.

Happy hacking! ✨

get.summary: Get a list of transparent organizations
get.description: Returns a list of organizations in Transparency Mode that have opted in to public listing.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Object types to expand in the API response (separated by commas)

200.description: Return a list of transparent organizations

get.description: The organization must be in Transparency Mode.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Object types to expand in the API response (separated by commas)

404.description: Organization not found. Check the id/slug and make sure Transparency Mode is on.

get.description: Transaction represent a line item on an Organization's ledger. There are various types of transaction (see the type below).

get.summary: Get a list of recent activities on transparent HCB organizations
get.description: Returns a list of recent activities from all HCB organizations that are in Transparency Mode and have opted in to public listing.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Object types to expand in the API response (separated by commas)

200.description: Return a list of recent activities

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Object types to expand in the API response (separated by commas)

404.description: Activity not found. Check the ID.
